Description: Set up Go module, Fiber router, PostgreSQL pgx pool, Redis client. Implement JWT validation middleware and Redis rate limiting.
Acceptance Criteria: JWT validates in-process; Rate limit restricts reqs/sec; Zerolog JSON tracing configured.

Description: Users DB table. Registration (password hash), Login (JWT issue), and OTP verification endpoints. Implements UserProvider contract.
Acceptance Criteria: Registration, Login, OTP verification endpoints active. PostgreSQL & Redis state mutates correctly.

Description: Companies DB table. 12-digit BIN format validation. Company CRUD endpoints. Implements CompanyProvider contract.
Acceptance Criteria: Company CRUD functions; 12-digit BIN format validation enforces structure; Status transition works.

Description: Equipment and Categories tables. Dynamic attribute validation based on category schema JSON. Compare equipment logic.
Acceptance Criteria: Equipment CRUD active; Category hierarchy defined in DB; Dynamic attributes enforce DB constraints.

Description: Listings table. State machine (draft → moderation → active → archived). Pricing constraints (fixed, rental per-day).
Acceptance Criteria: State machine validation rules applied; Pricing variations stored and queried correctly.

Description: Set up OpenSearch index. Write Kafka consumer for equipment.* events to sync index. 2GIS API integration for geo.
Acceptance Criteria: OpenSearch index active; Kafka consumer syncs equipment.* events within 5s; 2GIS geo works.

Description: Deals table. Deal state transitions (inquiry → negotiation → confirmed). Emits deal.status.changed to Kafka.
Acceptance Criteria: Deal state machine enforces invalid transitions; Emits kafka events successfully.

Description: Kaspi and Halyk webhook handling. Escrow hold/release logic mapping to DB state. Generate invoice records.
Acceptance Criteria: Kaspi/Halyk integrations functional; Escrow hold/release modifies DB balance securely; Invoice generation.

Description: Rental calendar logic. Hold pattern: Redis TTL temp lock leading to pessimistic PG row lock on confirmation.
Acceptance Criteria: Rental calendar conflict detection works; Redis TTL locks slots temporarily; PG locks confirm slots.

Description: Fiber WebSocket upgrade endpoint. Store threaded messages in MongoDB. Broadcast events. Update Redis presence/online status.
Acceptance Criteria: Fiber WebSockets upgrade successful; MongoDB message threads persist; Redis pub/sub presence accurate.

Description: Kafka consumer listening to deal, message events. Routes to FCM (Push), Postal SMTP (Email), and MongoDB (In-app feed).
Acceptance Criteria: Kafka consumer routes successfully to FCM, Postal SMTP; MongoDB in-app feed populates.

Description: Generate MinIO presigned URLs for client direct-upload. Integrate imgproxy webhook for resizing rules.
Acceptance Criteria: MinIO presigned URLs generated securely; imgproxy integration processes images successfully.

Description: HTML → PDF generator running Gotenberg. Merges DB contract data with PDF template and uploads to MinIO.
Acceptance Criteria: Gotenberg HTML→PDF generation templates map successfully; Resulting PDF uploaded to MinIO.

Description: Kafka consumer aggregating platform events. Batch inserts into PostgreSQL pre-aggregated views (daily/weekly).
Acceptance Criteria: Kafka event aggregation successful; PostgreSQL pre-aggregated views update daily.
